response.justification: Candidate meets minimum qualifications with 20 years of engineering experience and a BS in Computer Science, and recent AI infrastructure work at re:cinq is relevant. However, preferred qualifications are largely absent: no AI-focused degree, no recognized expertise in AI demonstrated through publications or major products, and no evidence of director-level strategic leadership or customer advisory work. The AI experience is recent (less than a year) and limited to infrastructure tooling. While the technical foundation is strong, the depth of AI expertise and strategic vision required for a Principal Engineer role are not convincingly demonstrated.
strengths: 20 years of software engineering experience across web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure domains demonstrates strong technical foundation and adaptability
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators at re:cinq, showing recent engagement with modern AI tooling and frameworks
Proven ability to build, maintain, and lead open-source platforms (GISCollective) and communicate technical knowledge through workshops and conference talks
concerns: No Master's degree or PhD in AI-related field; AI experience limited to less than one year at current role in infrastructure tooling rather than product or strategy
No demonstrated recognized expertise in AI, no major AI-powered products built, and no evidence of advising strategic customers on AI adoption or technology decisions

While experienced at Staff level, no clear evidence of director-level individual contributor responsibilities such as shaping product vision, identifying future state strategies, or leading technical direction for strategic initiatives

key_factors.factor: Limited AI expertise depth and product track record
Meets minimum 15+ years engineering experience requirement
